programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: It’s the finale of Country Ball season one. Through their journey, Dylan and Luca have become brothers. With Jesse’s help, they’ll show just how much they’ve grown as players. Get ready to cheer for some incredible football. You’re not going to want to miss this!

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Today, Kevin and Toli sit down with a new batch of business owners looking to grow and thrive. This first business owner is the heart of America personified. Mark Baylis founded Valor for struggling veterans around America and now it’s time for the A-team to help him scale his mission to reach more patriots in need. From there, the team touch base with a rough and tumble businessman who brings bespoke adventure experiences to life. After that, the pioneers of STAYCA VACA bring their niche business model to the team for evaluation. Then, Compliant Tech caps off the day with a shock to the system.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s time to break down what the A-Team has learned from our latest group of companies—and how we can best support them in reaching their goals. Today, the spotlight is on A-Team member Larry Ward of Market Rithm. This seasoned CEO has seen it all when it comes to marketing strategy—and he’s got the accolades to prove it. Now, he’s setting his sights on helping businesses gain a competitive edge in their marketing efforts. Next, we’re introduced to another powerhouse on Kevin’s team: Nate Bailey, founder of Unleash the Leader Within. Nate brings a dynamic, personalized approach to scaling businesses that have often been overlooked. Rounding out this insightful roundtable discussion are A-Team members Chandler Kline from PICMII Crowdfunding and podcaster Dr. Jason Dean, each contributing their own unique areas of expertise.

programme.desc:

Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas attracted a massive field of 2,960 entrants nearly doubling the record setting $15 million guaranteed prizepool to an astonishing $29 million. Nine players remain to contend for a first place payout of $4.1 million along with the honor of having their name forever inscribed on the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup. Benny Glaser hopes to maintain his commanding chip lead as play continues from nine players down to six.

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: The competition for the prestigious title of WPT World Champion is down to the final six players. Each of the six remaining players have guaranteed themselves a minimum prize of $1 million, but everyone has their eye on the top prize of $4.1 million. Who has what it takes to become WPT World Champion?

programme.title: WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: As the WPT World Championship at Wynn Las Vegas reaches its climax, four players remain in contention. The ultimate winner will receive $4.1 million to go along with their name added to the prestigious Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup and of course the coveted title of WPT World Champion. Don’t miss any of the thrilling action as we play down to the crowning of the WPT World Champion.

programme.title: S2E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you the world’s most thrilling rides. Watch Sam Reynolds, street shredder, Clemens Kaudela, slopestyle champion, Theo Erlangsen, trail innovator, and Vincent Tupin, downhill powerhouse, in an exhilarating GoPro Course Preview in South Africa. Then head to Zion, Utah for Red Bull Rampage with Jaxson Riddle, big-air phenom, Reed Boggs, freeride master, Thomas Genon, slopestyle superstar, and Tom Van Steenbergen, trail blazing pro, as they push the limits of skill and courage on some of the planet’s most extreme terrain.

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto
programme.desc: Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa on the adventure of a lifetime as they explore the vibrant cities and stunning beaches of Morocco. Plus, enjoy exclusive bonus footage featuring the very best of GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

programme.title: The Red Blood of Courage (1935)
programme.desc: A government agent goes undercover to infiltrate a gang of outlaws smuggling stolen gold, posing as one of them to uncover their operation while working to bring the criminals to justice

programme.title: Songs and Saddles (1938)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy becomes involved in a range dispute when a group of outlaws tries to force settlers off their land. Using his musical charm and sharpshooting skills, he works to protect the innocent and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A cowboy steps in to help a ranching community threatened by a gang trying to take control of local land and cattle. As tensions rise in the Saddle Mountain region, he rallies allies and confronts the outlaws in a fight to restore justice and protect the settlers.

programme.title: Jesse James Woman -1954
programme.desc: After the death of the infamous outlaw Jesse James, a determined woman gathers a group of loyal female followers to continue his legacy of crime. As they carry out daring robberies and evade the law, rivalries and danger threaten to tear the gang apart in the unforgiving frontier

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: A special agent infiltrates the notorious Reno Brothers gang in post-Civil War Indiana, posing as an outlaw to gather evidence against them while risking his life to bring the criminals to justice

programme.title: The Manhunt 1984
programme.desc: In The Manhunt, Tony Anthony stars in a relentless tale of vengeance and survival. When betrayal leaves him hunted across the frontier, a lone gunman must outwit deadly pursuers and face down ruthless enemies determined to see him dead. With tense showdowns, gritty action, and a hero who refuses to quit, this hard-hitting Western delivers a man’s fight against impossible odds.

programme.title: Rolling Plains 1938
programme.desc: Saddle up for song and adventure in Rolling Plains! When trouble brews on the open range, a brave singing cowboy takes the fight to rustlers and rogues with courage in his heart and music on his lips. Blending trailblazing action with toe-tapping tunes, this Western delivers wide-open thrills and melodies as big as the frontier itself.

programme.title: The Price of Power 1969
programme.desc: In The Price of Power, Giuliano Gemma stars in a gripping Spaghetti Western that blends frontier action with political intrigue. Set against the backdrop of President James Garfield’s visit to Texas, a deadly conspiracy unfolds as ruthless enemies plot an assassination. Caught between gunmen, corruption, and betrayal, one man fights to uncover the truth and deliver justice. With explosive shootouts, sweeping style, and echoes of real history, this is a Western where the cost of freedom comes high.

programme.title: The Feud of the Trail
programme.desc: A man who's a dead ringer for the leader of an outlaw gang kills the gang leader, then takes his place to try to bring the gang to justice.

programme.title: Sagebrush Trail
programme.desc: A man framed for murder escapes prison and goes west, where he joins a gang with the real killer involved.
